attribution: CADBench (Doris et al. 2026, DeCoDELab; arXiv:2605.10873), MIT (c)2026 Annie Doris. Per-program execution-status + error-message logs under tested_models/*/*/r1/bench*_results/bench*_logs.json (486 files, ~1.44M rows). These are MODEL-GENERATED eval OUTPUT (noisy), so the raw files are MANIFEST-ONLY (paths + SHA-256, resolved from resources/ at runtime, degrade-to-empty). The distinct status codes and the error-string categories are extracted into the loader as facts with citation, NOT the raw rows.
